flashcards.back: Create, Read, Update, Delete - the four basic database operations

flashcards.front: Which method returns the number of rows affected by an UPDATE or DELETE operation?
flashcards.back: The update() and delete() methods return the number of rows affected

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of ContentValues class?
flashcards.back: ContentValues is used to store key-value pairs for database operations, providing type safety

flashcards.front: Why should database operations be performed on background threads?
flashcards.back: To prevent blocking the UI thread and avoid Application Not Responding (ANR) errors

flashcards.front: What happens if you don't call setTransactionSuccessful() before endTransaction()?
flashcards.back: All operations in the transaction will be rolled back
